allow: PowerShell(try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3007 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } ; "stopped" } catch { "no listener on 3007" })

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/db/seed.js'\).then\(async m=>{await m.seed\(\); const {getPlayers}=await import\('./src/repo.js'\); const ps=await getPlayers\(\); console.log\('Players:', ps.map\(p=>p.name\).join\(', '\)\); process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
